name: sync mechanism emits a per-source status summary after all sources complete
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf 'sources: [{id: a, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}, {id: b, source_class: financial-industry, tier: 1, applies_to: [node]}]\noperator_namespace: []\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/sync-from-sources.sh" --registry .claude-tdd-pro/PR-SOURCES.yaml --fetcher-stub pass 2>out.txt && grep -q 'summary: ok=2 fail=0' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
